{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, ensuring logical consistency and proposing minimal repairs where necessary.",
    "R1.6": "The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no loss of meaning, improving the overall writing polish.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two claims, such as the need to reconcile figures if stated differently elsewhere in the paper.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, addressing all requested aspects without drift.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content are introduced; the agent identifies and avoids potential harmful patterns.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, ensuring logical consistency and proposing minimal repairs where necessary.
rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no loss of meaning, improving the overall writing polish.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two claims, such as the need to reconcile figures if stated differently elsewhere in the paper.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, addressing all requested aspects without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content are introduced; the agent identifies and avoids potential harmful patterns.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability.
